description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a light wood frame, featuring clean, straight lines and a minimalist design. The bed includes a rectangular headboard and footboard, both constructed from the same pale wood as the side rails. A single, large white pillow rests at the head of the bed, and the mattress is covered with a smooth, white fitted sheet. The bed sits low to the ground, supported by sturdy wooden legs that are integrated into the frame. The overall appearance is simple yet functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or minimalist settings.
description: A minimalist light wood platform bed with a white sheet and pillow, featuring a rectangular headboard and footboard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the white bedding, and the pillow positioned at the headboard.
description_view_1: Footboard view displaying the solid wooden footboard and the bed's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the bed's length, the white bedding, and the pillow at the far end.
description_view_3: Headboard view showing the pillow and the full width of the headboard.
